violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-Freezers need cleaned of food debris.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single-use cups being stored on floor. Must be 6 inches off of floor in back storage room.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-freezers need cleaned of food debris.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Move cart away from handwashing sink to allow better access to sink.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
